C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\chdr-benchmark.dir/objects.a
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\chdr-benchmark.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\chdr-benchmark.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\gcc.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\chdr-benchmark.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o chdr-benchmark.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libchdr-benchmark.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\chdr-benchmark.dir\linkLibs.rsp
